_comment: Verified 2026-07-01 against live DOM. Input is contenteditable div#ask-input[role='textbox'] (Lexical editor — inject with execCommand insertText, one method at a time). Send button button[aria-label='Submit'] only RENDERS once text is present; it is enabled while composing and becomes disabled (disabled=true) after submit. On an empty input it is absent, so the static probe's send check will report 'none matched' — expected, not a failure. Automated runs typically submit via the Enter-key fallback. Stop button button[aria-label='Stop response (Esc)'] appears during generation (web search + answer) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Answer text is div#markdown-content-0. NOTE: a bare div.prose matches every news/source card on the page, so it is intentionally NOT used as a fallback.
